tasks.name: Project Scaffold
tasks.doneWhen: npm run dev opens Electron window with 640x400 black canvas, nearest-neighbor scaling. npm test passes.

tasks.name: Core Engine — Canvas Renderer + Game Loop + State Machine
tasks.doneWhen: App launches, game loop at 60fps, StateMachine switches between placeholder states with different colored backgrounds.

tasks.name: Input Manager
tasks.doneWhen: Input events captured and queryable. Test state displays pressed keys on canvas.

tasks.name: Asset Loader + Data Types
tasks.doneWhen: AssetLoader loads all JSON files with typed arrays. Dice roller parses '2d6+3'. Tests pass.

tasks.name: Main Menu Screen
tasks.doneWhen: App launches to styled main menu. Arrow keys and mouse navigate. New Game transitions. Quit closes window.

tasks.name: Character Creation — Race & Class Selection
tasks.doneWhen: Player can create 1-6 characters with race, class, stats, alignment, name. Party stored in GameState.

tasks.name: Character Creation — Party Review & Management
tasks.doneWhen: Player can review, remove, reorder, equip default gear for characters before starting adventure.

tasks.name: Save/Load System
tasks.doneWhen: Save to slot, quit, relaunch, load from slot — all party data intact. Roundtrip serialization tests pass.

tasks.name: Phase 1 Integration Test
tasks.doneWhen: Full loop works: Menu → Create party → Review → Save → Quit → Relaunch → Load → Verify. Integration tests pass.

tasks.name: Town Hub — Main Screen & Navigation
tasks.doneWhen: Town hub displays with 6 navigable locations. Save works. Depart transitions to placeholder dungeon.

tasks.name: Town — Adventurers' Guild (Party Management)
tasks.doneWhen: Player can view character sheets, see equipment, train characters with enough XP and gold.

tasks.name: Town — Temple & Shop
tasks.doneWhen: Heal at temple, buy/sell items at shop, equip items. Gold transactions correct.

tasks.name: Town — Tavern & Rumors
tasks.doneWhen: Visit tavern, read random rumors. Rumors change between visits.

tasks.name: Tile Map Data Structures & Visibility
tasks.doneWhen: TileMap loads map JSON, FogOfWar computes visible/visited/hidden tiles. All tests pass.

tasks.name: Dungeon Screen — Canvas Tile Renderer + Camera + Minimap
tasks.doneWhen: Dungeon shows colored tile map on canvas with fog of war, party marker, minimap. NOT black canvas with DOM text.

tasks.name: Dungeon Movement & Interaction
tasks.doneWhen: Arrow key movement, camera follows, fog reveals, doors work, walls block. Message log updates.

tasks.name: Dungeon HUD — Party Stats, Compass, Facing
tasks.doneWhen: Compass, facing text, party HP bars, info bar all rendered on canvas alongside tile viewport.

tasks.name: Dungeon Events & Encounters
tasks.doneWhen: Events trigger from map data. Encounter screen shows Fight/Parley/Flee. Random encounters work.

tasks.name: Phase 3 Integration Test
tasks.doneWhen: Complete dungeon loop with canvas graphics, fog of war, minimap, HUD, events. Visual difference from FD1 obvious.

tasks.name: Combat Engine — Core Mechanics
tasks.doneWhen: CombatManager runs complete combat programmatically. All unit tests pass.

tasks.name: Combat Screen — Battlefield Renderer + UI
tasks.doneWhen: Combat shows colored combatant sprites on canvas with pulsing active indicator and attack animations.

tasks.name: Combat — Target Selection & Action Resolution
tasks.doneWhen: Target selection, attack resolution with visual feedback, defend and flee work.

tasks.name: Combat — Victory, Defeat & Rewards
tasks.doneWhen: Victory awards XP + loot, returns to dungeon. Defeat shows game over with load/quit.

tasks.name: Combat — Integration with Dungeon
tasks.doneWhen: Full flow: dungeon encounter → combat with real data → victory → loot → back to dungeon. Fixed encounters don't retrigger.

tasks.name: Phase 4 Integration Test
tasks.doneWhen: Complete create → explore → fight → loot → return → heal → save → load loop with visual combat.

tasks.name: Spell Memorization System
tasks.doneWhen: Characters memorize spells during rest. Slots tracked per class/level. Character sheet shows spells.

tasks.name: Spell Casting in Combat
tasks.doneWhen: Spellcasters cast memorized spells in combat. Damage/heal/effects work. Slots expended.

tasks.name: Inventory & Equipment Polish
tasks.doneWhen: Full inventory management — view, equip, unequip, drop. Equipment changes reflected in stats.

tasks.name: Phase 5 Integration Test
tasks.doneWhen: Complete spell memorization → casting → inventory → equipment loop works.

tasks.name: Overland Map — Canvas Renderer & Travel
tasks.doneWhen: Travel between town and dungeon entrances on canvas overland map. Random encounters trigger.

tasks.name: Dungeon Zone 1 — Goblin Warrens (2 Floors)
tasks.doneWhen: Two-floor Goblin Warrens playable with encounters, boss, treasure, stairs.

tasks.name: Dungeon Zone 2 — Crypt of Shadows (3 Floors)
tasks.doneWhen: Three-floor Crypt playable with undead encounters, Vampire Lord boss, environmental hazards.

tasks.name: Dungeon Zone 3 — Ruins of Ashenmire (2 Floors)
tasks.doneWhen: Two-floor Ashenmire playable with swamp encounters, Black Dragon boss, environmental hazards.

tasks.name: Quest System & NPCs
tasks.doneWhen: Accept quests from Town Hall, track in quest log, complete in dungeons, turn in for rewards.

tasks.name: Phase 6 Integration Test
tasks.doneWhen: Complete game playable start to finish — all zones, quests, combat, spells, inventory.

tasks.name: Audio System
tasks.doneWhen: Background music per state. SFX for combat/exploration/UI. Volume adjustable.

tasks.name: Visual Polish & Screen Transitions
tasks.doneWhen: Smooth transitions, no visual glitches, consistent EGA aesthetic, 60fps.

tasks.name: Final Integration & Packaging
tasks.doneWhen: npm run build produces working packaged app. Game playable start to finish, no critical bugs.
